[BRANCH] main
[TASK] Pro milestone — WebSocket NCP (ADR-001)
[STATUS] planning

[DONE] Lite v0.1.0-alpha.1 released to nuget.org (5 packages)
[DONE] GitHub Release v0.1.0-alpha.1 created
[DONE] .mcp.json added for Claude Code integration
[DONE] nuget.config: Banyan.* routed to nuget.org, Nexus for OLS.Root.* only

[NEXT] Start Pro: implement WebSocket NCP transport
       ADR: .claude/memory/cold/ADR-001-pro-websocket-ncp.qmd
       Entry point: Banyan.Node / MemoryNodeApp.RunAsync
       Approach: MapWebSocket, same port as HTTP, Tier2 MsgPack, --ncp-mode flag

[FILES]
[BLOCK]
